creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
building print/pdftk fails with gcc42.

Fix: 

I have no idea.
	gcc44 cannot build this, with the lack of ecj1.
	i build gcc44 with ecj.jar, but it fails to build pdftk with segfault.
How-To-Repeat: 	% cd /usr/ports/print/pdftk
	% make
	...
	/usr/local/bin/gcj42 -L/usr/local/lib -O2 -w --encoding=UTF-8 --classpath="/usr/local/work/usr/ports/print/pdftk/work/pdftk-1.41/java_libs" -C Token.java
	/usr/local/bin/gcjh42 --classpath="." Token;
	rm Token.class
	/usr/local/bin/gcj42 -L/usr/local/lib -O2 -w --encoding=UTF-8 --classpath="/usr/local/work/usr/ports/print/pdftk/work/pdftk-1.41/java_libs" -C TokenMgrError.java
	/usr/local/bin/gcjh42 --classpath="." TokenMgrError;
	rm TokenMgrError.class
